description: A minimal screenshot/text card of a Department of Labor news release on a plain white background with no graphic design beyond typography. Black text reads 'News Release' (small bold) above a large bold serif headline 'US DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AWARDS $2.3M IN FUNDING FOR WEST VIRGINIA RESIDENTS AFFECTED BY FEBRUARY STORMS' and an italic subhead 'Additional funding supports jobs, training in affected communities.' No photos, seals, illustrations, or color accents are present. The intent is plain promotion of DOL disaster-relief grant funding; the tweet adds 'It's our duty and honor to serve. God Bless the great people of West Virginia.' Marked is_designed=false as it is a routine text/press-release card with no meaningful design treatment (same style as 3_1995574678371401728).
notable_text: US DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AWARDS $2.3M IN FUNDING FOR WEST VIRGINIA RESIDENTS AFFECTED BY FEBRUARY STORMS; Additional funding supports jobs, training in affected communities
